nasb.text: The righteousness of the upright will deliver them, But the treacherous will be caught by their own greed.

esv.text: The righteousness of the upright delivers them, but the treacherous are taken captive by their lust.

cnv.text: 正直人的公義必拯救自己， 但奸詐人必陷溺於自己的惡慾中。

ccb.text: 正直人被义行所救， 奸诈者被私欲所掳。

csbs.text: 正直人的公义必解救自己； 背信者必被自己的欲求缠住。
